abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: U Protected (Fae)
abilities.text: After an enemy model targets this model, this model may discard a card. If it does so, a friendly Fae model within 2" suffers any effects generated by that action.

abilities.name: Royal Escort
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may drain a (soulstone). If it does so, it and up to two allies within (aura) 8" may move up to 5".

actions.name: The Third Law
actions.effects: If this action receives a raise, the target gains a Suppressed token.

triggers.name: Marked
triggers.text: The target gains an Adversary token.

actions.name: Issue Command
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Another ally only. This action cannot target the same model more than once per activation.

triggers.name: Pulled Here and There:
triggers.text: Move either this model or the target up to 3".

actions.name: Queen's Domain
actions.effects: Make one Underbrush marker within range, plus one more for each raise this action receives.

triggers.name: Lost in the Wilds:
triggers.text: Move up to two enemy models within range up to 6" toward any of the made markers.

triggers.name: This Land is Mine:
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker within 1" of a made marker.

actions.name: Sabotage their Plans
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per turn. Target an enemy Scheme marker.
actions.effects: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target, then remove the target.
